title: Celonis Intern Software Engineer Interview Questions & Practice
metaDescription: Ace your Celonis Intern Software Engineer interview with AI-powered practice questions and feedback. Get ready for your NYC internship.
content:
# Celonis Intern Software Engineer Interview Preparation

Prepare for your Celonis Intern Software Engineer internship interview with comprehensive practice questions and AI-powered feedback.

**Location:** NYC
**Application Status:** Open for Applications

## Interview Practice Features

- Real interview questions from Celonis
- AI-powered feedback and scoring
- Technical and behavioral question practice
- Company-specific preparation tips
- Industry insights and trends

## About This Opportunity

Celonis is offering a Intern Software Engineer internship position in NYC. This is an excellent opportunity to gain hands-on experience in software engineering.




## Interview Preparation Tips

1. Research Celonis's products and mission
2. Practice coding problems and system design
3. Prepare behavioral examples using the STAR method
4. Review your resume and be ready to discuss projects
5. Prepare thoughtful questions about the role and company

## Start Your Interview Practice

Use our AI-powered interview practice tool to prepare for your Celonis interview and increase your chances of success.
